package domain

import "time"

// Positive scenario for giant_model_struct_spans_multiple_subdomains.
// Rule intent: Oversized model structs that merge multiple bounded contexts
// (billing, shipping, inventory, users, etc.) into one persistence shape.

// Order is a god model that spans billing, shipping, inventory, user management,
// analytics, and notifications subdomains. It should be split into separate
// aggregates per bounded context.
type Order struct {
	// Primary key
	ID string

	// Billing subdomain fields
	BillingAmount       float64
	BillingCurrency     string
	BillingAddress      string
	BillingCity         string
	BillingState        string
	BillingZipCode      string
	BillingCountry      string
	BillingTaxAmount    float64
	BillingDiscountCode string
	BillingInvoiceID    string
	BillingPaymentMethod string

	// Shipping subdomain fields
	ShippingAddress     string
	ShippingCity        string
	ShippingState       string
	ShippingZipCode     string
	ShippingCountry     string
	ShippingCarrier     string
	ShippingTrackingNum string
	ShippingWeight      float64
	ShippingCost        float64
	ShippingMethod      string
	ShippingEstimatedDelivery time.Time

	// Inventory subdomain fields
	InventorySKU        string
	InventoryWarehouse  string
	InventoryStockLevel int
	InventoryReorderPoint int
	InventoryBatchID    string
	InventoryExpiryDate time.Time

	// User/Account subdomain fields
	UserEmail           string
	UserFirstName       string
	UserLastName        string
	UserPhone           string
	UserDateOfBirth     string
	UserLoyaltyPoints   int
	UserMembershipTier  string

	// Analytics subdomain fields
	AnalyticsSource      string
	AnalyticsCampaignID  string
	AnalyticsReferrerURL string
	AnalyticsSessionID   string
	AnalyticsDeviceType  string

	// Notification subdomain fields
	NotificationEmailSent   bool
	NotificationSMSSent     bool
	NotificationPushSent    bool
	NotificationPreference  string
	NotificationLanguage    string
}
